response_body.response: you're seeing thinning. first thing: is it diffuse (all over) or localized (crown, temples)? and how long has it been happening. the reason i ask is the protocol splits. if it's early and you catch it now, minoxidil + finasteride is the evidence-backed stack. minoxidil improves blood flow to follicles and increases thickness; finasteride blocks the hormone (DHT) that shrinks them in the first place. both take several months to show results, so consistency matters. before you jump to meds though: are you washing your hair too often or too little. scalp health is the foundation. most people do best with 2 washes per week, and buildup or dryness can make thinning look worse than it is. what's your current routine look like, and where exactly is the thinning.

products.name: Kirkland Signature 5% Minoxidil Solution (6-month)
products.description: Generic 5% minoxidil liquid — same active as Rogaine, lower cost.
